attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
,OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT
,BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
,AR_TRX_LINE_KEY   
,BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
,OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY   
,OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER              
,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE    
,CAST(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6))DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   
,CAST(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,CAST(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT , 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT 
,CAST(COALESCE(DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY , 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY    
,BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
,OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT      
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
,'N'LATEST_DR_BKGS_FLG
,'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
,'N' AS LATEST_RECORD_FLG           
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD
FROM
(
SELECT 
BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
DV_OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT AS OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT ,
OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CD AS BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
MANUAL_TRX_KEY,
DV_OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
DV_OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUM AS OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
(-1 * DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT) AS  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
(-1 * DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT) AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
(-1 * DD_COMP_US_COST_AMT) AS DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT,
(-1 * DD_EXTENDED_QTY) AS DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
DV_OVERLAY_SALES_CMSN_PCT AS OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
'R' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,            
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD
FROM    $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_DRVD_BKGS_MEASURE MT
WHERE OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'O_ADJ' AND LATEST_DR_BKG_FLG='Y' AND DV_LATEST_SC_FLG='Y' AND MANUAL_TRX_KEY >0 
AND EXISTS 
( 
select 1 from $$STGDB.WI_DIRECT_BOOKINGS_MNL_O_F  OD  /* Temp3*/
where 
MT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY = OD.MANUAL_TRX_KEY  )  
) A

SELECT              
BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
,OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT 
,BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE                
,AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
,MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
,OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY   
,OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER                   
,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE         
,COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT, 0)   
,COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT, 0)  
,COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT, 0)        
,COALESCE(DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY, 0)          
,BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
,OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT  
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM   
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER               
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM  
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER   
,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY   
,LATEST_DR_BKGS_FLG            
,FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG           
,LATEST_RECORD_FLG    
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD
FROM
(
SELECT 
WDDMO.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY AS BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
,NMOVRLY.SCASA_CREATION_DT AS OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT
,BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,WDDMO.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   
,WDDMO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY    
,WDDMO.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT  
,WDDMO.MANUAL_TRX_KEY AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY     
,NMOVRLY.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  AS OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  ,NMOVRLY.SALES_REP_NUM OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER
,WDDMO.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE   AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  
,CAST((NMOVRLY.SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*WDDMO.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6))   AS  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,CAST((NMOVRLY.SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*WDDMO.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT 
,CAST((NMOVRLY.SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*WDDMO.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS  DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
,CAST((NMOVRLY.SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*WDDMO.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
,NMOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
,NMOVRLY.SALES_COMMISSION_PCT   AS OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT   
,WDDMO.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,WDDMO.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
,'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG_BKGS      
,'Y' AS LATEST_DR_BKGS_FLG            
,'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG           
,'Y' AS LATEST_RECORD_FLG             
,WDDMO.BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT            
,WDDMO.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,WDDMO.PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD
FROM 
$$ETLVWDB.EL_DIRECT_DATA_MNL_O_INCR  WDDMO
INNER JOIN 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SLS_CR_ASGN_REBOK_MNL_ADJ NMOVRLY
ON WDDMO.MANUAL_TRX_KEY=NMOVRLY.MANUAL_TRX_KEY 
AND NMOVRLY.SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD IN ('R','CR')  AND NMOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD<>'DR'
AND WDDMO.EDW_UPDATE_DTM> (select LAST_EXTRACT_DATE from $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES where JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_EL_DIRECT_DATA_MNL_O_INCR' and TABLE_NAME='EL_DIRECT_DATA_MNL_O_INCR')
 )  A
